title: Phase1 Scan Agent Envelope
description: JSON envelope returned by ScanAgent (Phase 1 auto-scan path). Full reports are written to context/project-context.md, context/existing-patterns.md, context/tech-constraints.md; envelope carries only structured summary fields consumed by the main thread. NOTE: decision_points and existing_patterns will move to required after Task C14 lands (which updates all Scan envelope producers to emit these fields). Until then they remain optional but are still validated when present.

summary.description: 3-5 sentence structured summary; full body MUST be written to output_files, not inlined here.

existing_patterns.description: List of existing-pattern identifiers/summaries detected in the codebase.

output_files.description: Relative paths of full scan reports (typically context/project-context.md, context/existing-patterns.md, context/tech-constraints.md).
